{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mo She
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mo She]] is a skeletal man with mismatched eyes; one milky white and the other green [[jade]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
